---
title: My dynamic report
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)
library(tidyverse)

logged_data <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vTRwLiMWePLMqiV4WMcgRVqAU-tmE6eMrdye1PlyS5O1HUBreGv1fm7G78GIP0YFr2vNs-ev64MSL8E/pub?gid=1623781049&single=true&output=csv")

latest_data <- logged_data %>%
  rename(
    coffee_type = `1.What type of coffee did you drink?`,
    price = `2.How much did it cost (NZD)?`,
    location = `3. Where did you buy it?`,
    rating = `4.How would you rate it (1–5)?`
  )

mean_price <- mean(latest_data$price, na.rm = TRUE)
max_price <- max(latest_data$price, na.rm = TRUE)

top_coffee <- latest_data %>% count(coffee_type, sort = TRUE) %>% slice(1) %>% pull(coffee_type)
```

```{css}
body {
  font-family: Arial;
}
h2 {
  color: #6b4f4f;
}

```
## ☕ Coffee Drinking Insights
This report explores my coffee drinking habits, including what types of coffee I drink, where I buy them, and how much I spend.

On average, I spend `r round(mean_price, 2)` NZD on coffee.
The most expensive coffee I bought cost `r max_price` NZD.
My most frequently purchased coffee type is `r top_coffee`.



```{r}
pets <- c("cat", "dog", "turtle", "rabbit")
best_pet <- pets[1]

# 1. 咖啡类型计数图（按频率排序）
latest_data %>%
count(coffee_type) %>%
ggplot() +
geom_bar(aes(x = reorder(coffee_type, -n), y = n, fill = coffee_type),
stat = "identity", show.legend = FALSE) +
labs(
title = "Number of Coffees by Type",
x = "Coffee Type",
y = "Count"
) +
theme_minimal() +
theme(
axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
)

# 2. 购买地点计数图
latest_data %>%
count(location) %>%
ggplot() +
geom_bar(aes(x = reorder(location, -n), y = n, fill = location),
stat = "identity", show.legend = FALSE) +
labs(
title = "Where Coffee Was Bought",
x = "Location",
y = "Count"
) +
theme_minimal() +
theme(
axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
)

# 3. 评分分布图
latest_data %>%
count(rating) %>%
ggplot() +
geom_bar(aes(x = factor(rating), y = n, fill = factor(rating)),
stat = "identity", show.legend = FALSE) +
labs(
title = "Coffee Ratings Distribution",
x = "Rating (1-5)",
y = "Count"
) +
theme_minimal() +
theme(
plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
)


```

### Useful links
[Visit GitHub](https://github.com)  
[Learn R](https://www.r-project.org/)

### Fun GIF
![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExY3Zoa2FtZW95dHU3cTMyZjF1azZ2eWx2Z3h3anc4cXFxeGxxMDBmdCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/qXBsRpqWGsA8/giphy.gif)
